class.name: B4R::B4RNimBLEAdvertiser
class.comment: @class B4RNimBLEAdvertiser @brief Lightweight BLE scanner wrapper for B4R.
class.event: NewData (Mac() As Byte, Buffer() As Byte)

method.name: Initialize
method.comment: @brief Initializes the BLE stack and sets the local device name. @param DeviceName The name that will appear in scan responses.

method.name: SetManufacturerData
method.comment: @brief Injects custom data into the Manufacturer Specific (0xFF) field. @param Data Byte array containing the raw payload (e.g., Govee/Ruuvi format).

method.name: SetServiceData
Start
method.comment: @brief Starts the BLE radio transmission. @param DurationMS Total time to advertise in milliseconds (0 = infinite).

method.name: SetDebug
method.comment: @brief Toggles verbose Serial logging for the library. @param Enabled True to enable debug output.
